v8a_cors_fix_validation.reason: Cannot validate {{ORIGIN}} macro expansion without an actual substrate.office.com chat completion POST. M365 Copilot login wall prevents reaching the chat surface that would issue the substrate request. Test environment lacks active M365 session for jhee28@plantynet.com.

files.note: All four PNGs capture the same login-wall state since no further surfaces were reached. AUTH_REQUIRED_SKIP is acceptable per spec; V8-A CORS fix remains unverified end-to-end on test PC and requires either (a) M365 login on test PC by user, or (b) a CORS validation harness that does not depend on M365 session.

recommendation: Per spec, AUTH_REQUIRED_SKIP is acceptable. To actually verify V8-A CORS fix for m365_copilot, recommend: (1) user logs into jhee28@plantynet.com once on test PC Chrome to persist M365 session; or (2) decouple CORS verification by testing {{ORIGIN}} echo against a service that does not require M365 SSO (e.g., re-run on a service with same envelope shape but lower auth barrier); or (3) inspect engine logs directly for substrate.office.com Origin handling on a recorded session.
